requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power-Quality Evidence — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 for SEGESA / Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量证据——用于SEGESA / 项目审查的IEC 62920和IEC 61000
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質證據——用於SEGESA / 項目審查的IEC 62920和IEC 61000

summary.en: No confirmed standalone Equatorial Guinea EMC technical regulation for solar PV inverters has been identified for this dataset. In practice, EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared for SEGESA, EPC, lender, or owner-engineer review using international PV inverter references. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards are commonly used for emissions, immunity, harmonic current, flicker, and power-quality evidence. Because Equatorial Guinea is a small, nascent grid-tie market with utility-led project review rather than a mature public inverter certification list, exporters should align EMC files to the exact project specification and document the test voltage, firmware configuration, filter options, cable layout assumptions, and installation environment.
summary.zh: 本数据集尚未识别到赤道几内亚针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC技术法规。实际操作中，应按照国际光伏逆变器参考标准，为SEGESA、EPC、贷款方或业主工程师审查准备EMC和电能质量证据。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列标准通常用于排放、抗扰度、谐波电流、闪变和电能质量证据。由于赤道几内亚是规模较小且仍处早期的并网市场，项目审查更多由公用事业主导，而非依据成熟公开的逆变器认证清单，出口商应使EMC文件与具体项目规格一致，并记录测试电压、固件配置、滤波选项、电缆布置假设和安装环境。
summary.zht: 本資料集尚未識別到赤道幾內亞針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC技術法規。實際操作中，應按照國際光伏逆變器參考標準，為SEGESA、EPC、貸款方或業主工程師審查準備EMC和電能品質證據。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列標準通常用於排放、抗擾度、諧波電流、閃變和電能品質證據。由於赤道幾內亞是規模較小且仍處早期的併網市場，項目審查更多由公用事業主導，而非依據成熟公開的逆變器認證清單，出口商應使EMC文件與具體項目規格一致，並記錄測試電壓、韌體配置、濾波選項、電纜佈置假設和安裝環境。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards for emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and power quality
IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12 — Harmonic current emission references depending on inverter current rating and project specification
IEC 61000-6-2 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Generic industrial immunity and emission references where specified by EPC or owner engineer

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification files, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These files may reference IEC 61000-style methods but are prepared for China domestic certification and China grid assumptions. They are not automatically accepted by SEGESA, lenders, EPCs, or owner engineers as IEC 62920 or project-specific IEC 61000 compliance evidence for Equatorial Guinea.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证文件以及CNAS认可实验室报告形成。这些文件可能引用IEC 61000类方法，但其用途是中国国内认证和中国电网假设。它们不会被SEGESA、贷款方、EPC或业主工程师自动接受为赤道几内亚项目的IEC 62920或项目特定IEC 61000合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證文件以及CNAS認可實驗室報告形成。這些文件可能引用IEC 61000類方法，但其用途是中國國內認證和中國電網假設。它們不會被SEGESA、貸款方、EPC或業主工程師自動接受為赤道幾內亞項目的IEC 62920或項目特定IEC 61000合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC laboratory reports for China voluntary certification

gap.en: Gap: China domestic EMC reports should be treated as supporting evidence only. For Equatorial Guinea projects, prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 EMC reports for the exact inverter model, rating, firmware, and grid configuration. If previous tests were run at China nominal voltage or with China firmware settings, confirm with the SEGESA-facing project engineer whether retesting or engineering justification is required for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. The file should also address tropical humidity, enclosure ingress protection, corrosion exposure, condensation management, ventilation clearances, and any derating applied to maintain EMC and thermal performance.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内EMC报告应仅作为支持性证据。对于赤道几内亚项目，应为准确的逆变器型号、功率等级、固件和电网配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000 EMC报告。若既有测试按中国标称电压或中国固件设置完成，应与面向SEGESA的项目工程师确认针对230/400 V、50 Hz是否需要重新测试或工程论证。文件还应说明热带湿度、外壳防护等级、腐蚀暴露、冷凝管理、通风间距以及为保持EMC和热性能而采用的任何降额。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內EMC報告應僅作為支持性證據。對於赤道幾內亞項目，應為準確的逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體和電網配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000 EMC報告。若既有測試按中國標稱電壓或中國韌體設置完成，應與面向SEGESA的項目工程師確認針對230/400 V、50 Hz是否需要重新測試或工程論證。文件還應說明熱帶濕度、外殼防護等級、腐蝕暴露、冷凝管理、通風間距以及為保持EMC和熱性能而採用的任何降額。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory in practice where SEGESA, EPC, lender, or owner engineer specifies IEC 62920, IEC 61000, harmonic, flicker, immunity, or power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific in China; domestic GB/T and NB/T EMC evidence does not create automatic Equatorial Guinea project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 and project-specified IEC 61000 evidence in Equatorial Guinea. Build an EMC package around the exact model, firmware, 230/400 V at 50 Hz operating conditions, and tropical installation environment. Confirm the final EMC and harmonic evidence list with the SEGESA-facing EPC, lender, or owner engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC报告不会自动替代赤道几内亚项目中的IEC 62920及项目指定IEC 61000证据。应围绕准确型号、固件、230/400 V、50 Hz运行条件和热带安装环境建立EMC文件包。出货前请与面向SEGESA的EPC、贷款方或业主工程师确认最终EMC和谐波证据清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC報告不會自動替代赤道幾內亞項目中的IEC 62920及項目指定IEC 61000證據。應圍繞準確型號、韌體、230/400 V、50 Hz運行條件和熱帶安裝環境建立EMC文件包。出貨前請與面向SEGESA的EPC、貸款方或業主工程師確認最終EMC和諧波證據清單。
